findings.quote: The owners who last treat curation as seriously as a bookseller treats a front table.
findings.note: Register: reads as a lightly awkward relative clause ('who last treat' = who survive treat), the one seam in an otherwise idiomatic BrE society-column voice. Not disqualifying — cloze prose is 'slightly easier' per corpus, and the surrounding voice matches the educated-magazine register.

comparative_note: Sits comfortably inside the ELF register. The five gaps are POS-uniform and suffix-rhymed (austerity/loyalty/novelty/casualty; portable/durable/disposable/negotiable) exactly as the corpus cloze family prescribes, and each gap turns on collocation or discourse polarity rather than fact. The Priya-Mehta framing, the dry characterful quote and the concrete residue (former launderette, waiting lists, publishers courting venues) give it the same lived-in feel the Pantheon exemplar (ELF-040) earns through Dio Cassius and its measurements. Genre and intellectual temperature are on target; only a single clumsy clause keeps it from a spotless pass.

Indistinguishable from an authentic single-question ELF short text. At 142 words with one 'According to the text' detail stem it matches the short-text budget precisely, and its science-journalism residue (forty nesting pairs, eleven minutes, a confirming manipulation with dimmed light) is denser and more concrete than the clean single-point mini-texts 'Education and Pay' and 'Aging Research' (ELF-031 pair). The correct option paraphrases ('stirs up the moths the owls eat') rather than recycling passage strings, as the corpus key device demands. Genre-true AmE popular-science voice; passes clean.

findings.quote: A vessel that reached the quay safely paid the keepers a fixed toll; a vessel that ran aground paid nothing at all. The council's records show that it never once had to discipline a keeper for a darkened lantern.
findings.note: Manufactured tidiness: the passage is a frictionless incentives parable in which every clause confirms the thesis. A perfectly opposed pair of towns (private-paid Vellmar vs salaried Hesse-Aldern), a 'never once' record, an enviably rising wreck rate next door and an ironic non-failure dissolution leave no concrete residue of a messy real world. Contrast the Pantheon exemplar (ELF-040), which carries genuine scholarly uncertainty ('some confusion over what Agrippa's original Pantheon looked like') and particulars that resist the through-line. Reads as engineered-to-make-a-point rather than excerpted.

comparative_note: Structurally a valid ELF short text — 137 words, one inference stem, BrE history-magazine surface, paraphrase options — so it clears the format bar the ELF-031 exemplars set. What holds it back is intellectual temperature: the two-town natural experiment is too clean, a settled just-so fable with no digression or countervailing detail, where the Pantheon exemplar keeps live debate and stray particulars in play. Passes as HP but sits at the tidy edge of the range; adjudication should decide.

One of the strongest units. It lands on the modal ELF long topic (late-life cognition) with a real complication rather than a settled fact — the book-club comparison group quietly dismantles the romantic music thesis — which is exactly the tension HP long passages assume of an educated reader. Concrete residue is thick (96 volunteers, Merritt Ohio, sixteen weeks, seven dropouts, retest at three months) and sentence rhythm varies from long subordinated periods to the 8-word verdict 'The instrument is optional. The effort is not.', matching the within-passage variance the corpus flags as authentic. Question geometry is textbook: main-idea at pos 1, stance at pos 5, detail/inference between — the bimodal edge placement seen in the exemplar block (ELF-036..040). Options paraphrase and none recycle passage word-runs. Indistinguishable in kind.

A model forskningsreferat that carries the full LÄS structural signature the corpus calls load-bearing: result-lede opening, a short title line, a named byline (Torsten Bjällerup) and a glossary tail (armatur/frösättning/himlarand) glossing the hardest domain terms. Register is nominal, subordinated and agent-light with -s passives (redovisas, kartlagt), matching the sakprosa exemplars LÄS-020/018 rather than breezy prose. Crucially it is not a settled fact: it stages a real objection (entomologen Nils Korseberg) and researcher rebuttal, plus weather and generalisation caveats — the same directional, scoped, hedged claim structure that lets the overgeneralisation/reversed-causality distractors bite. At 813 words it sits in the lower long band but well inside it. Passes clean.

A genre-true debatt/insändare short. First-person situated stance (twenty years by Tärnviks hamnbassänn), a concession move ('Missförstå mig rätt') and a byline (Ingrid Vallmark) place it squarely with the Ekberg exemplar (LÄS-016), which argues in the same first-person evaluative register with its own 'Det håller jag inte med om'. The planted claim is directional and scoped (kaféerna, not utställningarna, drew the återkommande besökare per a fictional Tärnviksenkät), giving the författarens-hållning and enligt-texten items real purchase; options paraphrase. Length (324 w) is dead-center in the short band. Indistinguishable from an authentic op-ed short.

findings.quote: Selma ordnade sina blad efter det linneanska systemet. ... Hedda gjorde tvärtom.
findings.note: Symmetric two-object construction: the paragraphs open in near-mirror ('Selma ordnade...' / 'Hedda gjorde tvärtom'), the kind of paragraph symmetry the gate treats as a tidiness risk. Here it is redeemed rather than disqualifying — the essay deliberately stages the neat binary in order to dismantle it ('ju längre jag bläddrar, desto mindre säker blir jag på att gränsen håller'), which is a genuine kulturhistorisk-essä move, not settled-thesis exposition.

comparative_note: Fits the rare literary/essä end of the corpus (~6% of LÄS): first-person, reflective, lower-register, titled and bylined (Alma Ekwall) with a glossary tail. Where the loaded exemplars are argumentative debatt, this is a curated-essä blueprint the corpus explicitly says exists and is structurally distinct — and it earns its place through real intellectual temperature: the vetenskap/känsla binary is set up only to be shown collapsing, which is the opposite of manufactured tidiness. The huvudbudskap item keys on a hedged whole-text thesis distributed across paragraphs, matching how LÄS whole-text questions attach. Passes; the symmetric setup is a genre device, not a synthetic tell.
